case_title: SUSAN CERCE VS. LOWE'S HIW INC

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE (PER PARTIES' SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-10-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SUSAN CERCE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LOWE'S HIW IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SIERRA SLOAT, EMPLOYEE - ASSISTANT STORE MANAGER. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT PRIOR TO THE HEARING WITH AN EXPECTED RESOLVE DATE OF 9/22/23. PARTIES MUST APPEAR AT NEXT HEARING FOR TRIAL IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES BY PARTIES, COURT WILL DISMISS THIS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY CERCE, SUSAN AS TO DEFENDANT LOWE'S HIW INC DBA LOWE'S HIW INC #3095 ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-15-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: CSC - LAWYERS INCORPORATING SERVICE] FILED BY PLAINTIFF CERCE, SUSAN AS TO DEFENDANT LOWE'S HIW INC DBA LOWE'S HIW INC #3095
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-31-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LOWE'S HIW INC DBA LOWE'S HIW INC #3095
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SIERRA SLOAT, EMPLOYEE - ASSISTANT STORE MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT LOWE'S HIW INC DBA LOWE'S HIW INC #3095
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROGRESS REPORT RE: PARTIES' SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER PARTIES' SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT PRIOR TO THE 9/15/23 HEARING. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCES BY PARTIES AT TODAY'S PROGRESS REPORT HEARING, THE COURT DISMISSES THIS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO THE PARTIES' SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ALLYSYN OVERTON; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
